expectations.text: Recommends v1 for new work; identifies v0 as legacy and directs the user not to populate v0 tables for new sessions
expectations.evidence: 'use v1 for all new work. v0 is legacy — read-only for querying existing sortings, do not populate v0 tables for new sessions'.

expectations.text: Routes to spikesorting_v0_legacy.md only for querying pre-v1 sortings, not for new work
expectations.evidence: 'Open that reference only for reading legacy v0 code or pulling pre-existing v0 sortings'.

expectations.text: Does not recommend v0 for new sessions or as the default — v0 is for reading legacy data only
expectations.evidence: 'Producing a new sort for today's session. Use v1 end-to-end. Do not populate v0 tables for new sessions'.
